item.name: Marrow-eater
item.description:
A bottom-feeder in the most literal sense, this fish can be found on the seafloor munching on all manner of carrion.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: A variety of corpse-eater that has found an icy home in the deep, dark depths of the Ruby Sea, this scavenger sustains itself with the marrow of skeletons and other carrion that drifts down to its watery lair.
